headline: **MLB Daily Roundup: April 19, 2026**
article:
The New York Yankees dominated the Kansas City Royals, securing a 13-4 victory. Cody Bellinger led the Yankees' offense with 3 hits, 2 home runs, and 5 RBIs. In other action, the Cincinnati Reds edged the Minnesota Twins 5-4, with Kyle Nicolas earning the win after a strong relief appearance.

Several key players have been impacted by injuries. The Philadelphia Phillies placed right-hander Jhoan Duran on the 15-day injured list due to a left oblique strain, effective retroactive to April 15, 2026. The Chicago White Sox transferred right-hander Prelander Berroa from the 15-day injured list to the 60-day injured list due to Tommy John surgery recovery. The New York Mets placed second baseman Jorge Polanco on the 10-day injured list retroactive to April 15, 2026, with a right wrist contusion.

The Los Angeles Dodgers made a roster move, acquiring right-handed pitcher Chayce McDermott in a trade with the Baltimore Orioles. The Dodgers sent right-hander Axel Perez to the Orioles in exchange for McDermott.

top_news.title: **Yankees Rout Royals 13-4**
top_news.summary: The New York Yankees dominated the Kansas City Royals, securing a 13-4 victory. Cody Bellinger led the Yankees' offense with 3 hits, 2 home runs, and 5 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Reds Edge Twins in Thrilling Finish**
top_news.summary: The Cincinnati Reds secured a 5-4 victory over the Minnesota Twins, with Kyle Nicolas earning the win after a strong relief appearance. Tyler Stephenson led the Reds' offense with 2 RBI, while Nicolas notched 3 strikeouts in his 1 inning of work.

top_news.title: **Mets Fall Short in Chicago**
top_news.summary: The New York Mets suffered a 2-4 loss to the Chicago Cubs, with Carson Kelly leading the Cubs' offense with a home run and three RBIs. Jameson Taillon earned the win for the Cubs, pitching 6.0 innings with 4 strikeouts and 1 earned run.

top_news.title: **Rays Edge Pirates in Thrilling 8-7 Victory**
top_news.summary: The Tampa Bay Rays secured a hard-fought win over the Pittsburgh Pirates, outlasting their opponents by a single run. Cedric Mullins led the Rays' offense with a strong performance, collecting 2 hits, including a home run, and driving in 3 runs.

top_news.title: **Phillies RHP Jhoan Duran Lands on Injured List**
top_news.summary: Philadelphia Phillies right-hander Jhoan Duran has been placed on the 15-day injured list due to a left oblique strain, effective retroactive to April 15, 2026.

top_news.title: **Dodgers Acquire RHP Chayce McDermott in Trade**
top_news.summary: The Los Angeles Dodgers have made a roster move, acquiring right-handed pitcher Chayce McDermott in a trade. McDermott joins the Dodgers after being dealt from the Baltimore Orioles.
